title: Update currency to INR and add food category with delivery options

requirements.summary: Change price display from USD to Indian Rupees (INR) throughout the application
acceptanceCriteria: All price displays show '₹' symbol or 'INR' label instead of '$' or 'USD'
Product creation form labels price input as 'Price (INR)' or similar
Cart and checkout pages show prices in INR
Order confirmation displays total in INR

file_operations.description: Update price display to show '₹' symbol instead of '$'. Change the price formatting from `$${product.price}` to `₹${product.price}` or similar INR formatting.
Update price display to show '₹' symbol instead of '$'. Modify the price rendering to use INR format with rupee symbol.
Update price and total displays to show '₹' symbol instead of '$'. Change both individual item price and calculated total to use INR formatting.
Update order summary section to display subtotal, shipping, and total amounts with '₹' symbol instead of '$'. Ensure all price calculations are shown in INR format.
Update order total display to show '₹' symbol instead of '$'. Change the total amount rendering to use INR formatting.
Update the price input field label from 'Price (USD)' or similar to 'Price (INR)'. Update any placeholder text or help text to reference INR instead of USD.

requirements.summary: Add 'Food' as a new product category option in frontend UI
acceptanceCriteria: CreateProduct form includes 'Food' in the category dropdown
Product catalog navigation shows 'Food' as a filterable category
Products can be created with 'Food' category and displayed correctly

file_operations.description: Add 'Food' option to the category dropdown/select field. The backend already supports the 'food' category enum value, so ensure the form includes this option alongside existing categories (electronics, books, clothing).

Add 'Food' link to the category navigation. Include a navigation link for the Food category that filters products by category=food, matching the existing pattern for Electronics, Books, and Clothing categories.

requirements.summary: Add delivery type field to product UI with '1-hour delivery' and 'Takeaway' options
acceptanceCriteria: CreateProduct form includes a delivery type selector with '1-hour delivery' and 'Takeaway' options
Backend Product type includes a deliveryType field
ProductCard shows the delivery type for each product
ProductDetail page displays the delivery type information
Existing products handle the new field gracefully (default or migration)

file_operations.description: Add a delivery type selector field to the product creation form with two options: '1-hour delivery' (maps to backend enum 'oneHourDelivery') and 'Takeaway' (maps to backend enum 'takeaway'). Include the deliveryType parameter in the createProduct backend call. The backend already supports the DeliveryType enum with these values.

Display the delivery type on each product card. Show the deliveryType field from the product data, converting the backend enum values ('oneHourDelivery', 'takeaway') to display-friendly labels ('1-hour delivery', 'Takeaway'). Position this information near the category or price for visibility.

Display the delivery type on the product detail page. Show the deliveryType field with appropriate formatting, converting backend enum values to user-friendly labels. Include this in the product information section alongside category and stock information.
